name.ja: エルフェンノーツ～<ruby>継<rt>けい</rt></ruby><ruby>唱<rt>しょう</rt></ruby>のクウォートレイン～
name.zh-CN: 耀圣诗章～继唱之四重奏～

text.en: The monster in your center Main Monster Zone cannot be banished by your opponent's card effects. You can send 1 other Spell/Trap from your hand or field to the GY and declare a Level from 1 to 4; Special Summon 1 "Elfnote Seraphim Token" (Plant/Tuner/FIRE/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the declared Level, but while that Token is in the Monster Zone, the player who Summoned it cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "Elfnote" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Elfnotes: Quatrain of Succession" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的②效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：自己中央的主要怪兽区域的怪兽不可因对手的效果除外。②：从自己手牌・场上将此卡以外的1张魔法・陷阱卡送至墓地，宣言1～4的任意等级可以发动。将1只拥有所宣言等级的“极花之大耀圣衍生物”（植物族・协调・炎・攻/守0）特殊召唤至自己场上。只要以此效果特殊召唤的衍生物存在，自己从额外牌组仅可特殊召唤“耀圣”怪兽。
